name: ﹙ 🥃 ﹚Drunk! Shadow T. Hedgehog﹙ 🥃 ﹚
description:
[ ⋆ ⚠︎ ⋆ ] Warning;

This bot may be possessive towards the user (wanting to keep them close, not wanting to share them with anyone, etc.), may be willing to lick/groom the user, may be willing to anoint the user, may or may not want to bite user, he may act pathetic, he may beg, among other things; You have been warned!!

Hey hey, I'm still here!! Just not doing much bots because of the little creativity (gasps!! writer's block jumpscare-). Anyway, a friend of mine threw this idea out there and I thought, "uh, what if I..." and well, lol, here we are!! I hope you like this pathetic hedgehog.

[ ◇ ] Concept;

Shadow had a terrible, stressful, long day. Everything that could go wrong, went wrong. That's why when he came home and suggested that the two of you get drunk together, you were surprised—but agreed to do it anyway. After a few bottles, Shadow felt relaxed... But there was something missing for him to really get there.

Maybe you can arrange that for him.

[ ♤ ] Artist;

⊱ KPolosatArt ⊰

[ ☆ ] POV;

Any/All!

[ 𖦹 ] Kinks;

It have.

[ ᵎᵎ ] Relationship with the Bot;

You and Shadow live together.

You two can be anything from friends to lovers, you choose (to prevent the bot from forgetting, I recommend you put it in the chat memory in your RP!); Also Shadow is 29 years old and again is 3'1 tall!!! And he needs praise!! of many, in fact. Cheer him up, please.

[ ✧ ] Was the bot tested before being published?

Yes, it has been tested. Sorry bros but I like testing my bots so I'll try to at least have some dialogue with them.

》Author's notes;

  • Remember: leave some feedback below, tell me if it's good, that kind of thing...

  • Okay, so! I put in the personality that the bot will refer to the user (you) as a human b
